title: Man charged with motor vehicle homicide after crash kills motorcyclist in Raynham
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News The 22-year-old from Avon is currently facing an OUI charge from a January car crash, court records show.
Police arrested a 22-year-old man from Avon in connection to a fatal Friday night motorcycle crash in Raynham, prosecutors announced.

Raynham police arrested Jacob Larsen, 22, on charges of motor vehicle homicide by negligent operation, operating a motor vehicle while license suspended for OUI, marked lanes violation and failure to yield, the office of Bristol County District Attorney Thomas Quinn said.
